signedCommit.description: A signed commit summarizing the current contents of a permissioned repo. The signature covers only the (space, author, rev, ikm) context; the content digest is bound by a symmetric MAC keyed from the public ikm, so a rebroadcast commit is deniable.

hash.description: sha256 of the repo's LtHash state (32 bytes).

ikm.description: Per-signature nonce (32 random bytes), freshly generated for each reader the commit is served to.

sig.description: Signature over the domain-separated commit context by the account's signing key.

mac.description: HMAC-SHA256(HKDF-SHA256(ikm, ctx), hash), binding the repo hash to this commit's context.

rev.description: Commit revision (TID), also bound into the commit context.

repoOp.description: A single entry in a permissioned repo's operation log. Operations applied atomically share a rev.

rev.description: The revision this operation was committed at.

cid.description: For creates and updates, the new record CID. Absent or null for deletes.

prev.description: For updates and deletes, the previous record CID. Absent for creates.

value.description: The record's current value, inlined by default. Omitted when excludeValues is set, or when a later operation has superseded this path.

repoRef.description: A repo in a space's writer set: an account that has written at least one record into the space, with its current head as far as the space host has been notified.

hash.description: Hex-encoded sha256 of the repo's current LtHash state, if the space host tracks it.
Hex-encoded sha256 of the repo's LtHash state after this commit.
